title: The Chemicals in Your Daughter's Blood Are Building Her Bones Wrong
description: A 2026 landmark study confirms what several converging cohorts have been signaling for years: PFAS — detectable in 99% of Americans including newborns — measurably reduce bone mineral density during the single developmental window when that density is being permanently set. Girls are disproportionately affected, the mechanism is now understood at the molecular level, and the deficit may be irreversible. Here's what the evidence actually shows, and what it doesn't.
